3049330.name: Travel Along 2
3049330.description:
Welcome to Travel Along 2, a hidden object game where you collect stamps, postcards and coins while searching objects around the world! With 3 game modes and puzzles between the chapters, Travel Along 2 will provide hours of fun for Hidden Object fans in enchanting locations. Souvenir shop, photo album and passport full of stamps are waiting to be filled through

Key Game Features

Replayable hidden object scenes!
Variety of puzzles along the way!
Morphing postcards and Stamps to find!
Souvenir shop!
3 Game Modes to choose from!
3049330.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
